phrases.intent_en: Where do I get wheelchair assistance
phrases.cultural_note: Airports provide wheelchair assistance upon request, typically coordinated at the check-in or information desk.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the cargo shipping desk?
phrases.text_local: Waar is de cargo shipping desk?
phrases.cultural_note: Dutch travelers expect clear signage to cargo operations; cargo terminal is seen as a separate area.

likely_response.local: Volg de borden naar cargo terminal.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to cargo terminal.

responses.english: Follow the signs to cargo terminal.
responses.french: Volg de borden naar cargo terminal.

phrases.intent_en: Is the duty-free shop past security
phrases.text_local: Is de duty-free winkel na de controle?
phrases.cultural_note: Duty-free shops are typically located in the departure lounge, post-security, as a standard airport feature.

phrases.intent_en: When does the next bus to Maastricht leave
phrases.text_local: Wanneer vertrekt de volgende bus naar Maastricht?
phrases.cultural_note: Airports often have frequent bus services to nearby cities, with departure times posted or announced.
Parkeren wordt betaald bij de automaat voor vertrek; contant is niet mogelijk.

likely_response.local: Aan de automaat bij de uitgang, pin of contactloos.
likely_response.translation_en: At the machine at the exit, by card or contactless.

responses.english: At the machine at the exit, by card or contactless.
responses.french: Aan de automaat bij de uitgang, pin of contactloos.

phrases.intent_en: Is the passenger terminal check-in open?
phrases.text_local: Is de check-in in de terminal open?
phrases.cultural_note: Dutch travelers value concise opening hours info; assumes standard operational hours unless specified.

likely_response.local: Ja, de check-in is open zolang er vluchten zijn.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the check-in is open as long as there are flights.

responses.english: Yes, the check-in is open as long as there are flights.
responses.french: Ja, de check-in is open zolang er vluchten zijn.
